data.title: NIO Q4 Earnings: Revenue & EPS Miss, 45% Delivery Growth, Margin Gains And More
data.description: Chinese EV maker NIO reports Q4 revenue of 19.70 billion yuan, up 15.2% Y/Y and 5.5% Q/Q. Vehicle deliveries increase 45.2% Y/Y.

data.title: Jensen Huang Admits Mistake, Says 'I Was Wrong' About Quantum Computing: Apology Fails To Lift RGTI, IONQ, QBTS, QUBT
data.description: Jensen Huang admitted commenting about quantum computing developments in January, which led the stocks lower.

data.title: Upcoming Earnings Season Likely To Be 'Problematic' For Investors, Cautions Senior Analyst: 'Going To Be A Massive Wake-Up Call'
data.description: As the sense of optimism spurred by the Federal Reserve's recent decision to hold interest rates fades away the first quarter earnings could surprise investors, predicts a seasoned analyst.

data.title: Mark Cuban Says He Supports Cutting Government Costs, But Hits Out At DOGE: 'I Would Have A Plan. Ready, Fire, Aim Is Not A Plan'
data.description: Mark Cuban defended his criticism of government cuts under DOGE, saying he supports efficiency, but only when done with a proper plan.

data.title: UnitedHealth Shares Rise 1.8% After Key Signal
data.description: A significant trading signal occurred for UnitedHealth stock as it demonstrated a Power Inflow at $505.54, after which UNH rose up to 1.8%.
